author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(chat): include in UMD build (#6793)
body:
* feat(chat): include in UMD build

Did not remove the umd file yet, as it's used by vue instantsearch and algolia-experiences bundles, which didn't get a change in setup.

* removed eventsource-stream mock, and implemented proper one for zod

* increase bundlesize limits

* fix storybook build

* bundlesize again

* storybook

* storybook build ?

* support IE11 by mocking each function instead of using proxy

---------

Co-authored-by: Aymeric Giraudet <aymeric.giraudet@algolia.com>
